data.content: Review result: requested beat-detail behavior appears implemented in src/components/beat-detail-lightbox.tsx. The header renders the natural beat id first, then aliases as separate click-to-copy controls formatted with a pipe separator and '(alias)' suffix, matching the requested 'proj-1234 | proj-5678.3 (alias)' shape. Supporting tests exist in src/lib/__tests__/beat-detail-lightbox.test.ts and alias wiring is covered in src/lib/__tests__/alias-view-contract.test.ts. Typecheck and build passed. Approval withheld because bun run test fails outside this beat scope in src/lib/__tests__/knots-backend.test.ts:504, so the required sanity-gate condition for implementation_review is not met.
